Describe the change.

## Area

Check the area that best fits.

- [ ] Build command or preset
- [ ] Character LoRA planning
- [ ] Config file
- [ ] `records.json` schema
- [ ] Preview/report output
- [ ] QA, review, revision, or result audit workflow
- [ ] Prompt export or downstream handoff

## User-facing changes

List any command, config, schema, output, or documentation changes users should notice.

## Verification

Paste the commands you ran.

```powershell

```

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass with `PYTHONPATH=src python -m unittest discover -s tests`.
- [ ] README, docs, examples, or changelog were updated if user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] Schema docs were updated if `records.json`, config fields, or helper outputs changed.
- [ ] Example fixtures are small, reproducible, and intentional.
- [ ] Generated folders such as `outputs/`, `build/`, `dist/`, `*.egg-info/`, and `__pycache__/` are not included.
- [ ] Changes stay focused on shot planning, prompt records, review, QA, revision, result audit, or export workflows.

## Notes

Add reviewer notes, follow-up work, or known limitations.
